stories.title: Who wins the Stanley Cup Final? Previewing the NHL...
stories.summary: The final round of the 2026 playoffs begins on Tuesday. Here's what to know about the Hurricanes and Golden Knights.

stories.title: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Key stats for Game 1 o...
stories.summary: Here are the top players and trends to know ahead of Tuesday's clash.

stories.title: Eagles LT after Brown trade: 'Thank God it's over'...
stories.summary: There was a mixed reaction to receiver A.J. Brown's departure by his former Eagles teammates Tuesday, ranging from a sense of loss to relief that the saga is now in the rearview mirror.

stories.title: Sources: Steelers' Herbig gets 4-year, $100M deal
stories.summary: After sitting out individual drills during the Steelers' mandatory minicamp Tuesday, linebacker Nick Herbig agreed to a four-year, $100 million extension, including $42 million guaranteed, sources told NFL Network's Mike Garafolo and ESPN's Adam Schefter.

stories.title: Brown GM: No Garrett trade if Verse not included
stories.summary: Browns GM Andrew Berry was adamant that he did not seriously consider the Myles Garrett trade with the Rams until Los Angeles included Jared Verse in the deal.
